name: aeye
description: Capture images this Codex session touches and browse them in a tmux/kitty carousel.

interface.longDescription: Captures screenshots and diagrams touched during a Codex session (via apply_patch, view_image, and Bash tool calls) and browses them in a tmux/kitty image carousel.
defaultPrompt: Show me the images from this conversation
Draw the architecture as a D2 diagram
